meta.ogDesc: Sid leads on 44 pts after 96/104 matches

story: Sid leads on 44, but Quince is right on their shoulder — 2 back and sharpening the knives. Down at the bottom, Murray is nailed to the foot of the table on 23.

The cull. 40 teams are out — Mexico (all noise and heart, last-16 exit pre-booked) the marquee casualty. Sid still has the most skin in the game, 3 of six alive. Elsa and Murray are out cold, every last pick gone.
Next up, the quarter-finals: Ike's France v Sid's Morocco; Ellie's Spain v Sid's Belgium; Sid's Norway v Etan's England; Quince's Argentina v Big Pewerk's Switzerland.
